heroTitle: The product development system for teams and agents
heroSubtitle: Purpose-built for planning and building products. Designed for the AI era.

featureSections.title: Know exactly what to work on right now
featureSections.description: A 3D wheel picker cycles through six live cards — Current Focus, Blockers, Needs Reply, Next Event, Quick Capture, and Up Next — with urgent, reply, and queued stats plus a live clock.

featureSections.title: Your AI assistant that knows your workspace
featureSections.description: Built-in AI agents for task management, scheduling, GitHub integration, and web search. Chain-of-thought execution shows you exactly how decisions are made using your real data.

featureSections.title: Tasks with clarity built in — not bolted on
featureSections.description: Built-in Objectives and Success Criteria on every task. Kanban, Gantt, and Calendar views with hard dependency blocking. Tasks cannot be marked done until their blockers are resolved.

featureSections.title: Notion-quality docs, built right in
featureSections.description: Block-based rich-text editor with real-time collaborative editing, subpage hierarchies, cover images, and Notion sync. Full TipTap editor with slash commands and @mentions.

featureSections.title: Two-way Google Calendar sync with smart scheduling
featureSections.description: Tasks automatically become calendar events. AI scheduler finds free slots and auto-schedules your unscheduled tasks. Google Meet links generated automatically for events.

featureSections.title: Real-time chat that stays connected to your work
featureSections.description: Group channels, direct messages, and emoji reactions with real-time Socket.io delivery. Chat threads link directly to tasks, documents, and calendar events they describe.

featureSections.title: Stop losing what was decided in your last meeting
featureSections.description: Record audio with 5 visualizer styles, auto-transcribe with speaker diarization using Sarvam AI (23 Indian languages) or ElevenLabs. Turn decisions into tasks instantly.

featureSections.title: Connect with your entire tech stack
featureSections.description: Native integrations with Google Workspace, GitHub, Notion, and more. OAuth connections for Calendar, Drive, Gmail, Meet, Docs, Sheets. GitHub agent creates issues from tasks.

featureSections.title: Stay in the loop without being overwhelmed
featureSections.description: Real-time WebSocket notifications with granular controls. Filter by type: Tasks, Mentions, Chat, System, Motion. Mark all read, per-type toggles, and unread badges throughout the UI.

featureSections.title: Orgs, spaces, and settings — built in
featureSections.description: Multi-tenant Org → Space architecture with sidebar navigation, org switcher, onboarding wizard, full settings dialog, keyboard shortcuts, and role-based permissions at every level.

finalCtaTitle: Your team deserves a workspace that works.
finalCtaDescription: Join 7,000+ teams who replaced their scattered stack with KeilHQ. Everything unified. AI that knows your work.
finalCtaTrustText: No credit card required · Cancel any time
